parameters.name: FX Param 1
parameters.description: Function depends on FX Type selected

parameters.name: FX Param 2
parameters.description: Function depends on FX Type selected

parameters.name: Seq Track 2 Dest
parameters.description: Value 53 = Seq Slew for track 2 only

parameters.name: Seq Track 4 Dest
parameters.description: Value 53 = Seq Slew for track 4 only

groups.name: Gated Sequencer Steps
groups.description: 4 tracks x 16 steps. Values 0-125 = parameter value, 126 = Reset, 127 = Rest (track 1 only).

groups.name: Poly Sequencer
groups.description: 6 note tracks x 64 steps. Each track has note and velocity data.

parameters.name: Split Point
parameters.description: MIDI note number for split point

1.name: Mod Wheel
1.description: Performance controller, not a patch parameter

7.name: Master Volume
7.description: Global volume, not a patch parameter

notes.ccLimitation: CCs only cover a subset of parameters and are limited to 0-127 value range. For parameters with ranges >127 (e.g., cutoff 0-164, bipolar amounts 0-254, FX param1 0-255), CC mode scales the value. NRPN mode sends the full range.
notes.layerB: Layer B uses the same parameters with NRPN offset +2048 and SysEx offset +1024.
notes.sysexPacking: SysEx data is packed in 8-byte packets: 7 data bytes with their high bits stripped and packed into an 8th byte sent first. 1024 program bytes become 1171 MIDI bytes per layer.
notes.editBufferDump: Request with F0 01 2E 06 F7. Response is F0 01 2E 03 [layer A packed data] [layer B packed data] F7 (2339 data bytes for both layers).
notes.paramSendMode: The synth must be set to 'CC' mode (MIDI Param Send = CC) for CC numbers to work. Default is NRPN.
notes.lfoNoCc: LFO 1-4 parameters have NO CC assignments. They are NRPN-only. To control LFOs from the UI, you must use NRPN or SysEx.
notes.modMatrixNoCc: Mod Matrix slots 1-8 have NO CC assignments. NRPN-only.
notes.extModNoCc: External modulation assignments (mod wheel dest, pressure dest, etc.) have NO CC assignments. NRPN-only.
notes.bipolarParams: Parameters with max=254 are bipolar: raw value 127 = zero/center, 0 = -127, 254 = +127. The UI should display -127 to +127.
